build.notes: Seeded from external.gtfs.ro's CLUJ.zip (mdb-2121 mirror; route/stop/shape structure stable, schedule stale by months). Build REPLACES calendar/trips/stop_times.txt with fresh data scraped daily from ctpcj.ro CSV timetables, then re-packs the zip. Routes without CSV data are skipped; their structural metadata (route + stops + shapes) is preserved from the seed pass-through.
